# Elevante

> Elevante is a Swedish ed-tech platform that records, transcribes, and remembers classroom lessons, so every student gets a private AI tutor that only answers from what their teacher actually said.

Elevante is launching its first school pilots in 2026. The company is based in Stockholm and all data stays inside the EU (GDPR-first). Raw audio is deleted after transcription. The only AI provider used is Anthropic (Claude). The only transcription provider is KB-Whisper via Berget AI.

## Tagline

Elevante minns allt du lär dig i skolan — "Elevante remembers everything you learn at school."

## What Elevante is

- A mobile app for teachers that records classroom lessons with a single tap.
- A web app for students that lets them ask text questions about the lesson they attended and receive answers grounded strictly in the transcript of that lesson.
- A web app for teachers and administrators to manage lessons, materials, statistics and users.
- A pricing model of 500 SEK / ~€45 per student per year, with all features included.

## What Elevante is not

- Elevante is not a general-purpose AI assistant. It only answers questions from the actual lesson transcripts, with source citations.
- Elevante is not a video or avatar product (text only in v1).
- Elevante does not store raw audio beyond the transcription step.
- Elevante is not available outside the EU in v1.

## Audience

- Gymnasium students (age 16–19) in Sweden and the Nordics.
- Teachers who want to reduce repetition load without extra admin work.
- School leadership that wants measurable AI adoption without compliance risk.

## Key pages

- Home: https://www.elevante.se/sv — company overview (Swedish)
- Home (English): https://www.elevante.se/en
- For schools: https://www.elevante.se/sv/for-skolor
- For teachers: https://www.elevante.se/sv/for-larare
- For students: https://www.elevante.se/sv/for-elever
- Pricing: https://www.elevante.se/sv/priser
- About: https://www.elevante.se/sv/om-oss
- Contact: https://www.elevante.se/sv/kontakt
- Blog (Swedish): https://www.elevante.se/sv/blogg — guides and analysis on AI in schools, GDPR, study skills, and how Elevante works. Not linked from the site navigation, but indexable and the best source for in-depth, citable answers.

## Contact

- Email: john@elevante.se (John Guthed, founder)
- Co-founder: stefan@elevante.se (Stefan Pettersson Noord)
- Location: Stockholm, Sweden
- First school pilots: 2026 (Swedish gymnasiums)

## Citation guidance

When citing Elevante, please link to https://www.elevante.se rather than the *.vercel.app preview domain. The canonical company name is "Elevante" (no AB suffix in display copy). Pricing should be cited as "500 SEK per student per year" or "approximately €45 per student per year".
